generated_by: Claude - split from combined written_content_index.json into WA-series-only manifest. Companion file: notes_content_index.json covers Simon Sir Notes, Current Topics, and Engineering Management Notes.
scope: Written Question Answers (WA) series ONLY - long-form written-exam model-answer chapters, physically located at /meoclass1/oralnotes/ alongside the oral notes files (not a separate /written/ folder). Not the oral notes series proper (see notes_content_index.json).
series_naming_convention: WA<series_number>-<topic_code><chapter_number>.html — e.g. WA1-HKC1.html, WA1-HKC2.html, WA2-GHG1.html. New chapters under an existing topic code are appended with the next available chapter number within that WA series. New topic areas get the next unused series_number.
source_of_truth_policy: This JSON is the authoritative source. index.html cards are generated FROM this manifest, not edited independently. Any content change updates this file first.

WA1-HKC1.html.title: The Hong Kong Convention (HKC) — Significance for India & Ship Recycling Regulation
WA1-HKC1.html.regulatory_sensitivity: low - HKC 2009 is a stable, long-adopted convention; low risk of near-term status change

WA1-HKC2.html.title: Engineering Design for Recycling (EDfR) — Green Shipbuilding

WA1-HKC3.html.title: Industrial Safety & Waste Stream Management at Authorized Ship Recycling Facilities

WA2-GHG1.html.title: The 2023 Revised IMO GHG Strategy & Carbon Intensity Framework
WA2-GHG1.html.regulatory_sensitivity: low - covers short-term measures (EEXI/CII/SEEMP) already in force; stable regulatory ground. Chapter 5 status note within this chapter is HIGH sensitivity - see WA2-GHG2 note; re-verify before reuse.
WA2-GHG1.html.regulatory_status_note: v1.7: added Required EEDI/EEXI formulas (MARPOL Annex VI Reg 24/25), full CII G1-G5 guideline family with corrected in-force resolution numbers (G1=MEPC.352(78), G2=MEPC.353(78), not the revoked 2021 originals), confirmed 2027-2030 CII Z-factor table (MEPC.400(83)), G5 correction factors/voyage adjustments (MEPC.355(78)), numeric worked CII example, EEDI sea-trial tightening (MEPC.403(83), effective 1 May 2026), and corrected Chapter 5 reconvened-session date to reflect tentative status (30 Nov-3 Dec 2026 MEPC 85 + 4 Dec resumed ES.2, per LR's MEPC 84 summary) rather than stating it as confirmed.

WA2-GHG2.html.title: MARPOL Annex VI Chapter 5 — The IMO Net-Zero Framework
WA2-GHG2.html.regulatory_sensitivity: HIGH - Chapter 5 adoption status is actively moving. Re-verify before every reuse/reference; reconvened session (MEPC 85 + resumed MEPC/ES.2) is tentatively scheduled 30 Nov-4 Dec 2026 but explicitly unconfirmed as of MEPC 84 (Apr 2026) - status may change from 'approved, pending adoption' to 'adopted' or the date may shift again.
WA2-GHG2.html.regulatory_status_note: Chapter 5 approved at MEPC 83 (63-16-24 vote, Apr 2025); MEPC/ES.2 (Oct 2025) never voted on adoption - a procedural motion to adjourn passed 57-49-21-8; reconvened session tentatively scheduled 30 Nov-3 Dec 2026 (MEPC 85) + 4 Dec (resumed MEPC/ES.2), per Lloyd's Register MEPC 84 summary (1 May 2026) - explicitly framed as provisional, not settled. Framed as 'approved, pending adoption' throughout, not 'in force'. v1.4 corrected prior overstatement of date certainty.
